description_long: This office building is a mid-rise rectangular structure with a flat, overhanging roof and a highly regular facade. The exterior is dominated by a grid of large, evenly spaced windows set within a framework of vertical and horizontal structural elements, likely made of concrete or steel. The window frames and facade details are accented with muted tones, giving the building a modern yet utilitarian appearance. The building's facade is symmetrical, with no visible ornamentation or signage, emphasizing function over decorative elements. The windows are arranged in a repetitive, stacked pattern across all visible sides, suggesting a focus on maximizing natural light for interior office spaces. There is no clearly visible entrance or ground-level detail, indicating the view is focused on the upper stories.
description: A modern, mid-rise office building with a flat roof and a grid of large, evenly spaced windows across its facade. The structure features a symmetrical, utilitarian design with minimal ornamentation.
description_view_0: The building's facade is fully visible, showing a grid of windows and a flat roof with slight overhang; no entrance or signage is visible.
description_view_1: This view is nearly identical to view 0, with the same window grid and roof overhang, maintaining the building's symmetrical appearance.
description_view_2: The facade remains consistent, with the same regular window pattern and flat roof, no distinguishing features from other views.
description_view_3: This view mirrors the previous ones, showing the same grid of windows and flat roof, with no visible entrance or unique architectural details.
attribute_window_pattern: Uniform grid of rectangular windows arranged in vertical and horizontal rows, evenly spaced and repeated across all visible floors.
